raw_response:
[
  {
    "Step_id": 1,
    "Target": "darker box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Stabilize",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (right)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "The right end-effector can reach the right face of the darker box without colliding with the lighter box on its right; there is sufficient clearance to apply gentle lateral support without shifting the box.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is laterally supported by the right end-effector, reducing the risk of slipping or rotating during the lift."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 2,
    "Target": "darker box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Single-arm (left)",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "With the box stabilized, the left end-effector has access to the left face of the darker box; the cup in front of the lighter box is not in the lift path and will not be contacted.",
    "Postcondition": "The left end-effector has established a firm lateral grasp on the darker box while it remains supported and aligned."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 3,
    "Target": "darker box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Grasp",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "laterally",
    "Precondition": "Both end-effectors are positioned on opposite lateral faces of the darker box with enough clearance from the adjacent lighter box to avoid pinching or scraping.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is securely held in a two-sided grasp by both arms, with controlled force distribution for lifting."
  },
  {
    "Step_id": 4,
    "Target": "darker box (left box)",
    "Action concept": "Place",
    "Manipulation mode": "Dual-arm symmetric",
    "Contact mode": "Without claw",
    "End-effector contact side": "vertically",
    "Precondition": "The box is lifted slightly above the tabletop with a clear vertical path; the destination is defined as 'above the table' (picked up state) and does not require setting it down.",
    "Postcondition": "The darker box is held above the tabletop in a stable lifted pose, fully picked up and clear of nearby objects."
  }
]

parsed_json.Precondition: The right end-effector can reach the right face of the darker box without colliding with the lighter box on its right; there is sufficient clearance to apply gentle lateral support without shifting the box.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is laterally supported by the right end-effector, reducing the risk of slipping or rotating during the lift.

parsed_json.Precondition: With the box stabilized, the left end-effector has access to the left face of the darker box; the cup in front of the lighter box is not in the lift path and will not be contacted.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The left end-effector has established a firm lateral grasp on the darker box while it remains supported and aligned.

parsed_json.Precondition: Both end-effectors are positioned on opposite lateral faces of the darker box with enough clearance from the adjacent lighter box to avoid pinching or scraping.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is securely held in a two-sided grasp by both arms, with controlled force distribution for lifting.

parsed_json.Precondition: The box is lifted slightly above the tabletop with a clear vertical path; the destination is defined as 'above the table' (picked up state) and does not require setting it down.
parsed_json.Postcondition: The darker box is held above the tabletop in a stable lifted pose, fully picked up and clear of nearby objects.
